rLe	e
zEModule for testing the behavior of generics across different modules.
dedent)
TypeVar
Generic
Optional
    default_a: Optional['A'] = None
    default_b: Optional['B'] = None
    T = TypeVar('T')
    class A(Generic[T]):
        some_b: 'B'
    class B(Generic[T]):
        class A(Generic[T]):
            pass
        my_inner_a1: 'B.A'
        my_inner_a2: A
        my_outer_a: 'A'  # unless somebody calls get_type_hints with localns=B.__dict__
    
	default_a
	default_b
some_bN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
dict
__annotations__
//usr/lib64/python3.9/test/mod_generics_cache.pyr	
B.AN)
my_inner_a1Z
my_inner_a2Z
my_outer_aN)
